arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Chelsea Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch

arts.ttl: Man United 'plotting' intriguing Marcus Rashford 'swap deal' with Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly plan to use Marcus Rashford in a bid to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlovic during this summer's transfer window.

arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea head to Aston Villa in the Premier League on Saturday evening with both sides looking to address a slump in form. Enzo Maresca’s side have won just two of their last nine in the league to slip out of the Champions League places. Last Friday, the Blues were beaten emphatically at Brighton with the […] The post Chelsea XI vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Garcia opens up on Liverpool mistake and life under Emery at Villa
arts.sum: Aston Villa vs Liverpool, and it is no exaggeration to say that this is the biggest game of Andres Garcia's fledgling career. He has made two powerful runs up the right flank, cheered on by a packed crowd under the lights. Aston Villa are growing into it.

arts.ttl: Man United hero reveals Aston Villa humiliation and lifts lid on 'darkest moment'
arts.sum: Former goalkeeper Peter Schmeichel admits being pushed out of Aston Villa was the "darkest moment" of his football career. Man United hero reveals Aston Villa humiliation and lifts lid on 'darkest moment'

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich can offer out-of-favour Chelsea star lifeline as summer plan emerges
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku reportedly remains of interest for Bayern Munich amid uncertainty over his long-term future at Chelsea . In addition to Bayern, Manchester United were also tipped to offer Nkunku a new lifeline but a move didn't materialise in the end.

arts.ttl: Premier League title race: Can Liverpool hold off Arsenal after Arne Slot's team drew against Aston Villa, Everton?
arts.sum: Liverpool's two draws in their last three Premier League games has led to some concern that they could lose out on the title to rivals Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca needs Jadon Sancho and Pedro Neto to reignite stop-start careers and help save season

arts.ttl: Aston Villa set to seal agreement amid Chelsea interest
